description: Add secure personal access token backend actions.

userStories.title: Add hashed token storage with revocation timestamp
userStories.description: As a system, I want hashed token storage with revocation timestamp default null so token records are revocable and secure.
acceptanceCriteria: Token persistence stores token hash and revocation timestamp default null.
Stored token records keep label and ownership metadata for management operations.

userStories.title: Add create token server action
userStories.description: As a developer, I want create-token server action validating label length and returning plaintext token once so callers can store token safely.
acceptanceCriteria: Create-token action validates label length before issuing token.
Create-token action stores only token hash and returns plaintext token once in response.

userStories.title: Add revoke token server action
userStories.description: As a developer, I want revoke-token server action marking tokens revoked without deletion so revocation history stays intact.
acceptanceCriteria: Revoke-token action sets revokedAt timestamp without deleting token record.
Revoke-token action rejects already revoked or missing token identifiers.
